programme.title: Movie: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: A girl's relationship with a dream guy turns into a nightmare when he becomes abusive.

programme.title: Movie: Death of a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A high school student becomes obsessed with being the most popular girl.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Theft of a Cheerleader
programme.desc: After dropping out of high school, a 31 year old woman steals the identity of high school senior to redo her final year, no matter who gets in her way.

programme.title: Movie: The Cheerleader Escort
programme.desc: When a college cheerleader falls for The President of the Alumni Association she is immersed into a dark world of alumni escorts and mysterious pregnancies.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind
programme.desc: When tensions boil over between neighbours in small-town Florida, a local waitress and her family fall victim to a poisoning, and investigators must track down the mastermind behind one of the most cunning murder plots they’ve ever seen.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Mine, Moment, Machine
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker gambles on dry-mining equipment but a case of gold fever proves costly, nearly costing him a team member.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Hard Rock Risks
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Tyler and Parker head to a hard rock mine where they test the risk vs. reward with the help of some high explosives.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Future Ground
programme.desc: Parker heads into Australia's 'Super Pit' and makes a big decision that could change his career.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Confessions of a Record-Breaking Season
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike sends Parker, Rick and Tony in new directions. Parker breaks a major record mining his own ground. Tony abandons his dredges and moves his entire operation to the Hill. Rick gambles to find massive nuggets in Keno.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Threats
programme.desc: Parker's parents offer help, and his wash plant catches fire. Rick and his crew race the weather to finish their first season strong. And Tony heads into the wilderness to find lost equipment, and attempts to get his ancient dredge up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Confessions of a Record-Breaking Season
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike sends Parker, Rick and Tony in new directions. Parker breaks a major record mining his own ground. Tony abandons his dredges and moves his entire operation to the Hill. Rick gambles to find massive nuggets in Keno.

programme.desc: Parker's parents offer help, and his wash plant catches fire. Rick and his crew race the weather to finish their first season strong. And Tony heads into the wilderness to find lost equipment, and attempts to get his ancient dredge up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Footsteps of Legends
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel and his friends pay tribute to the legends before them and attempt the Klondike Trail of 1897. Not only is it 600 miles of mountains, lakes and rivers, but leaving dangerously late in the season means the winter may derail their plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Racing the Freeze
programme.desc: Parker and his crew are only 50 miles into the daunting 600 mile trek on the Klondike Trail. It's a race against time as the water is quickly freezing, but with food sources running low they are forced to pause and go hunting or face starvation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Hypothermia
programme.desc: With 375 miles to go to finish the Klondike Trail, time is of the essence as temperatures are dropping and lakes are freezing. When Parker falls into the frigid water, they are forced to stop, save him and take preventative measures.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Time for Time Outs
programme.desc: It's time-out time at the Waldrop house as Courtney and Eric start disciplining the sextuplets. The big boys are treated to a fun getaway, leaving Ramona and Popsie alone with all six babies. The family receives shocking news about their new mobile home.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Toddlers and Turkeys
programme.desc: Courtney and the babies are running late to Kayleigh's wedding because of a dead car battery. The Waldrop family moves 11 people into a 1,500 square foot mobile home during construction, right before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: 30,000 Dirty Diapers
programme.desc: The Waldrops are feeling a little cramped in their mobile home as construction starts on their house. Courtney wants to combine nine birthdays and potty train six toddlers.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Mobile Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: This Christmas, the Waldrops aren't decking the halls -- they're going stir-crazy inside the mobile home walls! They have to get a tree, visit Santa and try to keep Christmas special for the kids. Courtney also opens up about her postpartum hair loss.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Tumbles and Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Waldrops must evacuate the mobile home when a tornado touches down nearby. A school is destroyed during the tornado, so the boys hold a fundraiser to help the teachers. The babies compete in the First Annual Waldrop Sixtathlon with help from the boys.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Six Little Dates
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric take the babies on special individual dates, revealing surprising facets of each baby's personality. Wales and Bridge have their first karate test, but Bridge makes a shocking decision. A bombshell leaves the family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Matt surprises Amy with an offer to buy the north side of the farm, but she struggles to meet his deadline. Zach and Tori plan for a low-key Christmas as they adjust to life with baby Lilah, but Matt makes sure Jackson has the full holiday experience.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Lilah's Big Scare
programme.desc: Valentine's Day is coming, but problems get in the way of romance. When Lilah's cold turns into something serious, Tori's worst fears are realized. As Chris puts pressure on Amy to move out of the farmhouse, Amy and Matt battle over missed deadlines.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back!: What Goes Around, Comes Around

programme.desc: Stacey's Albanian fiancé, Florian, arrives in America, and the couple's 90 days begin. Darcey reveals a sexy new love interest. Stacey comes clean about meeting up with Darcey's ex, Tom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Funny Joints
programme.desc: Gina Yashere knows about black people who listen to country music, Kevin McCaffrey reacts to his pics, and Julian McCullough pays Kevin a potato-themed insult.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up
programme.desc: Find out what food Clayton English describes as 'edible gentrification,' what Julian McCullough thinks you shouldn't say when you're Amish, and what Jessimae Peluso steals from an audience member.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up
programme.desc: Moshe Kasher does the best victory dance ever, Clayton English and Moshe get real playing patty cake, and Natasha Leggero reveals two men in one from her past.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Gina Yashere Headlines
programme.desc: Gina Yashere headlines as Neko White has a run-in with the new Sherriff in town. Plus, Alex Scott teaches how to take cover and Tacarra Williams gets a fight in her son's bedroom.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Yamaneika
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Clayton English
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four adult friends in the midst of mid-life crises return to the '80s through a hot tub that's also a time machine. They arrive at a resort and decide they have a chance to change their destinies so they can be happier in their future lives.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 17
programme.desc: From an underwear clad girl giving a sobriety test, to amateur fireworks technicians, plus a funeral home Christmas greeting, these dumb performers shine in the roles they were both to play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crankin' Up the Classics
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, an Italian deli serves pizza and pasta. In Dallas, the menu includes gumbo and burgers with brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Flavour
programme.desc: Guy's looking for plates packing a punch. He tries a unique version of pizza that involves jam as well as an oxtail stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tasting all kinds of international comfort classics such as the authentic British fish 'n chips joint known for keeping it real.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits places where comfort food is done their own way. In Arizona, a Paris-trained chef prepares ham steak with red eye gravy, and a pastry chef in San Francisco has folks lining up for chili cheddar cornbread.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Time Favorites
programme.desc: Guy checks out places that are keeping the past alive. In Idaho, a landmark is serving up big plates, in Portland an old school lunch counter offers grilled cheese and in Miami, a family cooks up seafood like they did in Cuba.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Say That Again
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits three joints with the same name twice, such as Pok Pok, Tap Tap and Niko Nikos. He visits an old gas station in Houston, a Haitian restaurant in Miami Beach and a walk-up or dine-in place in Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Local Flavor
programme.desc: Guy visits an 85-year old Seattle joint for secret family chili, and a 100-year old California bar-turned-restaurant for crab cioppino and artichoke soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Viewer's Choice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to some great places viewers have suggested: a sixty-year-old legacy in Florida where even the fish goes in the smoker, a Hawaiian paradise outside of Seattle, serving up authentic island food that has mainlanders hooked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Eat
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers some great local favourites in Memphis, Virginia and Omaha.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.desc: In an effort to shake up traditional takes on fall foods, Valerie Bertinelli treats her guests, Chef Ludo Lefebvre, his wife, Krissy, and their 8-year-old twins, to a super special day-after brunch filled with seasonal treats for a long holiday weekend.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Sweet and Savory Start
programme.desc: The Kitchen is waking up your breakfast routine with sweet and savory recipes starting with Sunny Anderson's Monte Cristo Breakfast Plank. Next, it's time to be your own barista with an easy DIY Mexican Mocha.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: A Halloween meal includes candied apples, chicken tortilla soup and pumpkin roll.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Addicted to Chocolate
programme.desc: Molly Yeh shares her favorite choco-licious recipes to curb the cravings. She makes s'mores pie, chocolate sea salt rugelach and mini marzipan treats. Plus, rich and gooey Turkish coffee brownies will be enough to satisfy any chocolate appetite.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Spook-tacular Sweets
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a spine-tingling lineup of Halloween treats with the help of her kid crew.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Talk
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is celebrating the opening of her new sweet shop with a lineup of treats and sundaes. She makes incredible, old-fashioned Jeweled Divinity and shares the secrets to two of the over-the-top sundaes she serves at the parlor.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Haunt Your Home
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro shares his smoky butternut queso dip, and Alex Guarnaschelli makes her delicious homemade sunflower butter cups. Then, Sunny Anderson gives the secrets to making her bloody beef finger.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: My Sweets!

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her friend Glenda's birthday with a slumber party in comfy clothes, and delicious treats are on the menu.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Flippin' Out in the Kitchen

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bacon Masters
programme.desc: The bacon masters are back at it again when Guy Fieri welcomes four of the best bacon chefs to Flavortown Market for a real test of hog love. First, Guy has them make their best bacon sandwich after shopping in little, piggy-themed carts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Fast Food Face-Off
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges four fast food-loving chefs to recreate fast favourites like burgers, tacos and Chinese takeout. First, the chefs battle with their budgets to make their best burger and side.

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher

programme.title: Animal Impossible: Bears
programme.desc: Revealing the truth behind incredible myths surrounding the animal kingdom. Discover the best defense mechanism against a bear attack.

programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Food of the Gods
programme.desc: In ancient times, people spoke about divine substances that were consumed by the gods, and sometimes gifted to humans to impart great power, wisdom and even immortality.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Relics of Roswell
programme.desc: In 1947, the U.S. military collected the debris of what they claimed was a water balloon outside of Roswell, New Mexico. New evidence suggests however that the wreckage actually belonged to an extraterrestrial spacecraft.

programme.title: MonsterQuest: Serpentine Creatures
programme.desc: The MonsterQuest team investigates two legends involving serpentine creatures to uncover the truth of what lurks in dark waters.

programme.title: MonsterQuest: The Mystery of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: Something strange is killing animals and sucking their blood.

programme.title: MonsterQuest: The Hunt for Real Dragons
programme.desc: Dragons are huge, ferocious and frightening, and they live in remote corners of the world. They could be descendants of prehistoric reptiles.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of the Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Within a remote valley in Utah lies a ranch speculated to be a hotbed of inexplicable phenomena. This strange activity could potentially be connected to an alien entity known as the Skinwalker.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Dark Forces
programme.desc: In nearly every culture there are stories of opposing forces at work here on Earth, forces of a supernatural or otherworldly nature. Explore whether or not these forces really exist and what is the true nature of the dark forces.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: Texas
programme.desc: The history of Texas is an adventure of epic proportions. There are macabre spectator events, exotic animals, pirates, natural disasters, and an almost inconceivable political secret weapon.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Frontiersmen: Into the Wilderness
programme.desc: As the revolution commences, war ripples across the colonies and into the remote frontier. Daniel Boone's determination to realize and protect his settlement bleeds into a fight to save America's future.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Frontiersmen: Never Surrender
programme.desc: Shawnee warrior Tecumseh unites the Native American tribes to resist expansion; after Thomas Jefferson orchestrates the Louisiana Purchase, Lewis & Clark make their legendary expedition to the Pacific; and a new war for America begins.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Frontiersmen: Live Free or Die
programme.desc: Andrew Jackson and Davy Crockett enter the battle for Britain and Tecumseh's take back of America. The historic rivalry between Jackson and Crockett is born on the frontier.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Frontiersmen: Empire of Liberty
programme.desc: It's time for Davy Crockett to confront The Alamo. Meanwhile, President Polk chances war with both Britain and Mexico. He orders John Fremont and Kit Carson to undertake a secret mission, which leads to a war over California and the Pacific.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: A New War Begins
programme.desc: Out of the turmoil of the Civil War, America enters an age of enlightenment that will change the landscape of the country forever. The growth is driven by five insightful men who will change the world.

programme.desc: The Merrrye Family suffer from a rare disease causing then to regress mentally at age 10.

programme.desc: An elderly physician develops an elixir of life in order to resurrect his former lover.

programme.title: Movie: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: An anthology of three horror stories, including a vampire who must kill those he loves, and a resurrected witch seeking revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: A veteran is called upon to defend a friend's property from an unscrupulous developer.

programme.title: Movie: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A highly accomplished ninja master must protect his family when they are threatened.

programme.title: Movie: The Password is Courage
programme.desc: A British officer leads an attempt to escape from a German POW camp.

programme.title: Sheep Wrecked

programme.title: Cave Explorers
programme.desc: Explore a newly discover cave with Austrian speleologists.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Horatio Hornblower
programme.desc: The famed 19th century hero defeats enemy fleets and courts an admiral's widow.

programme.title: Movie: Support Your Local Sheriff

programme.title: Jessie: Katch Kipling

programme.title: Jessie: The Fear in Our Stars

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Aliens Among Us

programme.title: Raven's Home: Don't Trust the G in Apartment 4B

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Creepin' It Real
programme.desc: When Booker has a haunting vision on Halloween involving their new neighbor, the kids set out to prove the guy is really a monster.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Aliens Among Us

programme.desc: Trevor Tordjman and Ariel Martin host the family dance competition as both the Koonce and Helton families show their sibling bonds and battle it out to see which family will be named the "Disney Fam Jam" champion.

programme.title: Jessie: Driving Miss Crazy

programme.title: Bunk'd: By All Memes
programme.desc: Emma decides to give everyone back their cell phones to foster camp unity and bring everyone closer together on her new Campstagram App.

programme.title: Raven's Home: What About Your Friends?
programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.title: Raven's Home: In-Shoe-encer

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Champ-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie is getting ready to leave for Australia when he realizes he wants to get back together with Maddie. He isn't sure she feels the same. Diggie tries to talk with her, but she's swamped with the team winning the state championship.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Continued-A-Rooney
programme.desc: While Joey and Maddie try to catch Diggie before he departs for Australia, Liv covers for Maddie at home. But when Diggie shows up at the Rooney house, chaos ensues, reminding Parker of his favourite soap opera drama.

programme.title: Bunk'd: The S'more, The S'merrier
programme.desc: Three siblings embark on their summer at Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cape Boss/ Diner of the Dead
programme.desc: Mavis is called before Cape Court. Mavis accidentally starts the zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Horror Stories and Halloween Scares
programme.desc: When a power outage leaves the four friends locked in Sonic Boom overnight on Halloween, they pass the time by seeing who can tell the scariest ghost story.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Scary Spirits and Spooky Stories

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Jessie is tasked with ungluing Mrs. Chesterfield's hands from her head, while Ravi attempts to uncover who switched Mrs. Chesterfield's hair gel with glue.

programme.title: Jessie: Tempest in a Teacup
programme.desc: Emma and Zuri plan a romantic mystery-filled fifth first date for Jessie and Tony. Ravi, Cameron and Bertram get stuck in a giant teacup on a billboard.

programme.title: Jessie: Badfellas
programme.desc: Jessie has her hands full trying to keep a watchful eye on Emma, who has a major crush on bad boy Vincent.

programme.title: Jessie: A Doll's Outhouse
programme.desc: After the girls watch a scary movie, Jessie tries to help Zuri conquer her fear of dolls by confessing her own fear of porta-potties. Cameron teaches Ravi how to impress a girl, and Bertram listens to opera non-stop to win a radio contest.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: In high school, Christian, Erika and Pedro formed a tight trio: best friends who excelled at academics and shared big dreams. When they went to college something changed. It started with a secret romance and ended in tragedy.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Killing in Cottonwood
programme.desc: Karen and Mark Duenas had a special marriage. Teenage sweethearts, the couple managed to keep the romance alive even after raising five boys together. Then a perfectly ordinary night ended in murder, a tragedy that would test the bonds of family.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Killer by the Coast
programme.desc: When two female college students go missing, their whereabouts remain unknown for months, until a parole officer recalls startling information that would lead investigators to the backyard of a remote property.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Death in the Desert
programme.desc: After a homeowner randomly uncovers human remains while doing yard work in his California backyard, a homicide detective enlists the help of a local veterinarian to solve the murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Killing in Cottonwood
programme.desc: Karen and Mark Duenas had a special marriage. Teenage sweethearts, the couple managed to keep the romance alive even after raising five boys together. Then a perfectly ordinary night ended in murder, a tragedy that would test the bonds of family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Nikki Whitehead was a single mom working toward a brighter future. She found love, moved into a nice neighborhood and enrolled in college. Then, tragedy struck. Police searched for answers but one thing was certain. This crime was personal.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killing Everything
programme.desc: After an orderly is arrested for killing a patient at a Cincinnati hospital, a local reporter gets a tip that leads him to uncover new information about a string of horrifying deaths.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Danger Lurks Below
programme.desc: Mike Williams vanishes while duck hunting on a Florida lake, in an apparent accident. Nancy Grace traces how the victim's mother launched a campaign to learn the truth that uncovered a tale of greed, betrayal, murder, and injustice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: Michelle Mockbee is beaten to death at the Kentucky warehouse where she works, and cops realize the killer is likely a co-worker. They must eliminate employees one-by-one until the suspect is finally revealed, along with an outrageous motive.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Keep Your Friends Close
programme.desc: New Jersey teenager Sarah Stern disappears, and cops look to her family and friends for clues. They discover that some of those closest to her may not have been all they seemed, unravelling a tale of misplaced trust and deadly greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Unraveled
programme.desc: Connie Jones gives her first national interview since ex-husband Dwight Jones killed six people in Arizona over five days. Domestic violence and mass murder are discussed by experts and the criminal justice system that didn't stop Dwight is examined.

programme.title: Dateline: The Figure in the Garage
programme.desc: Police are desperate for answers when a beloved firefighter is found dead in his garage. A neighbour's home security camera captures a figure near the crime scene but is it the killer?

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: He Wasn't Alone
programme.desc: When a Florida teen tending to some yard work digs up a frightening scene, investigators find themselves in the middle of a twisted affair. A wild trail of evidence leads them across three state lines and the discovery of an astounding truth.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: No Body, No Justice
programme.desc: A Connecticut town is rocked when mother-of-five Jennifer Dulos disappears. The main suspect in her murder, her husband, uses his wealth to gain leniency and derail the case, before a shocking twist.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts: Confession Untold
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the devastating truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Winkler
programme.desc: Desperate to find her way out of financial crisis and escape a troubled marriage, this wholesome preacher's wife exchanged virtue for the ultimate vice.

programme.title: Snapped: Carmen Montelongo
programme.desc: A mysterious disappearance leads police to a woman pushing a trash can full of body parts down the street.

programme.title: Snapped: Christine Billis
programme.desc: A car crashes into a tree, killing a man. Was it just a tragic accident or a murder plot?

programme.title: Snapped: Kristi Fulgham
programme.desc: A 13-year-old confesses to murder, but police suspect he's being manipulated by his half-sister.

programme.title: Snapped: Cheryl Kunkle
programme.desc: A murder investigation which pits a son against his mother sheds new light on a previously unsolved death.

programme.title: Movie: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop has finally retired as a contract killer and settled down with the love of his life. When he turns down a contract, the employer kidnaps her. In order to save her, Arthur must complete three impossible assassinations of dangerous men.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Go Big or Go Homer
programme.desc: Homer is demoted to supervising interns, among whom is go-getter millennial Mike, a 35-year-old who asks Homer to be his mentor. However, when Homer inspires Mike to start a business of his own, the two find themselves being chased by the mob.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fat Blue Line
programme.desc: During the San Castellanta street festival, much of the town realizes their wallets have been pickpocketed. After the state investigator puts the wrong man in jail, Chief Wiggum sets out to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorillas on the Mast
programme.desc: After a trip to Aquatraz Water Park, Lisa becomes determined to set free Springfield's most vicious animals in captivity. Meanwhile, Homer fulfills a lifelong dream of buying a boat, and quickly realizes boat ownership sucks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge the Lumberjill
programme.desc: When Marge realizes that everyone views her as boring, she takes up competitive lumber-jacking as a hobby (and has a real gift for it). The circuit of competitive timbersports takes her on a month-long retreat to Portland with her trainer, Paula.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hail to the Teeth
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realize that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: The sea captain finds a treasure he's been searching for all his life, but it's taken from him by the townspeople. Marge convinces the people of Springfield to build a S.T.E.M. school with the money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frinkcoin
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the topic of Lisa's 'Most Interesting Person I Know' essay. Lisa instead chooses Professor Frink. While Lisa works on the essay, Frink develops a cryptocurrency, overtaking Mr. Burn's title of richest man in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Bad Guy
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a brand-new superhero movie a month before it comes out and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Screenless
programme.desc: Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, all of whom all easily adjust to the new lifestyle. However, Marge realizes that she is the one addicted not her husband and children.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Better Off Ned
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz. Then, a heroic act by Homer makes Bart look up to him again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Highway to Well
programme.desc: When Maggie goes to pre-school, Marge decides to get a job to pass the time and ends up working at an upscale weed dispensary. Then, Homer decides to open his own dispensary that mimics a sketchy drug deal, putting their two businesses at odds.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Incredible Lightness of Being a Baby

programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: How It's Made: Wind Generators, PVC Gloves, Thermo-formed Glass, Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Discover how wind generators work and are created, how PVC gloves are made, how thermo-formed glass is manufactured and how fire trucks are assembled.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Printing Aerospace Parts
programme.desc: George is curious about 3D printing and how additive manufacturing could change mass production. He sends Darieth to uncover the world of 3D printing aerospace parts that are no longer manufactured.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Look Back
programme.desc: Karen Simek is a talented food service worker. When her body is found with a gunshot wound outside her office in the early morning hours, it leaves her family in shock and sparks a year-long investigation, which ultimately leads detectives to her killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Death of Todd Stermer
programme.desc: Linda Stermer, accused of arson and murdering her husband, speaks out for the first time.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of the Mesa
programme.desc: Convicted of killing his wife in 2004, a Colorado man gets a second shot at freedom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Death of Todd Stermer
programme.desc: Linda Stermer, accused of arson and murdering her husband, speaks out for the first time.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water
programme.desc: Nearly four decades after the unexplained drowning death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, Los Angeles County Sheriff's Investigators speak for the first time and tell '48 Hours' that her then-husband, actor Robert Wagner, is now a person of interest.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Knock Knock
programme.desc: Go inside the investigation into the double murder of two beloved grandmothers, who were killed after answering a knock at their door. A podcast and a detective using cutting edge technology may offer hope in solving the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Death in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: The suicide of a 16-year-old Utah teenager was a tragedy, but how it happened may have also been a crime. A friend who had many opportunities to stop her helped her complete the act instead.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: An Obsession
programme.desc: The crime scene of a double murder shows evidence of conflicting motives. An unlikely clue on the living room floor helps Detective Postiglione zero in on what really happened, leading to the arrest of an unassuming killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Check List
programme.desc: In 1991, a woman is found murdered inside a Nashville motel room. The investigation escalates after Detective Postiglione discovers a similar crime scene in Cincinnati, sending him on a year-long odyssey to capture a serial killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: How to Get Away With Murder
programme.desc: Convicted killer Christopher Waide speaks to 20/20 from prison to discuss how he almost got away with the murder of Lea Porter in 2014. He was able to cover up his crime with the skills he learned from a criminology class.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rear Window
programme.desc: The murder of a young boy rocks a small town and he might have been a victim of jealous rage, caught in the crosshairs of a love affair gone wrong.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Camera Didn't See
programme.desc: It was a murder mystery that lingered for years. Nique Leili, a wife and mother, was found dead near her suburban home a week after going missing. Her family immediately suspected husband Matt, who filed for divorce within days of her disappearance.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Grab and Go
programme.desc: A robber attempts to hold up four young men at gunpoint, but he's in for a surprise when his victims fight back. And then, a man with a shotgun storms into a garage, but is outmatched by an employee who won't back down.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: An afternoon motorcycle ride turns into a violent road rage incident when a couple is attacked by an angry driver. And then, when a young woman working alone is robbed at knifepoint, she bravely fights back, fending off her assailant.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: A strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, but a 16-year old wrestler saves the day. And then, when a frightening cab robbery takes place in broad daylight, someone unexpected comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With My Kid
programme.desc: Two armed thieves approach a young woman to steal her car. But they get a shock when she fights back. And then, the father of a 15-year-old girl sets up a family sting to apprehend the 33-year-old man who is trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No Fear
programme.desc: A man with a large gun enters a bar late at night and orders everyone to get on the floor, but one patron refuses to comply. And then, a pair of brazen shoplifters lead police on a dangerous high speed chase.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Stranger Danger
programme.desc: A man steals a car with two young siblings inside, causing a panic. As they try to escape, the kidnapper grabs the girl's hoodie, but her brother bravely fights back. And then, a 12-year-old stands up to the woman trying to kidnap her baby brother.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Eyes on Her
programme.desc: Two young women are savagely murdered. One has gone fishing only to turn up beaten and drowned, and the other is a pregnant mother attacked while on the job delivering newspapers.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Death and Silence
programme.desc: The body of a young musician turns up in an alley. Police learn she's been spending time with an older man.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried
programme.desc: After an argument one morning, Michael McGuffey shot his wife point blank in the head. With support from his mother, Michael flees Mexico where he remarries and has a child. The FBI is able to trace Michael by his bank records and bring him into custody.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried
programme.desc: After an argument one morning, Michael McGuffey shot his wife point blank in the head. With support from his mother, Michael flees Mexico where he remarries and has a child. The FBI is able to trace Michael by his bank records and bring him into custody.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Otter Tail Transformation
programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: From LA to Lake Tuscaloosa
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Relocation Renovation
programme.desc: A NYC couple looks to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and purchases a fixer-upper only a short ferry ride away on the Jersey Shore. But once renovations begin, they discover so many problems that they wonder if they might be in over their heads.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Forever Home in Isle of Palms
programme.desc: After relocating from the Midwest to Isle of Palms, South Carolina, Wendy is looking for her forever home. She finds a home close to the beach, but it needs a lot of work, so she sets out to turn her dream into a reality.

programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.desc: A NYC couple looks to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and purchases a fixer-upper only a short ferry ride away on the Jersey Shore. But once renovations begin, they discover so many problems that they wonder if they might be in over their heads.

programme.desc: After relocating from the Midwest to Isle of Palms, South Carolina, Wendy is looking for her forever home. She finds a home close to the beach, but it needs a lot of work, so she sets out to turn her dream into a reality.

programme.title: Hidden Gold: Bull in a Barn
programme.desc: This 200-year-old barn is packed to the brim with forgotten antiques. Some of them are worth big bucks, including a rare copy of Margret Mitchell's 'Gone with the Wind.' First editions have sold for $40,000, so Eric might be in store for a huge payday.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Scandinavian Modern?
programme.desc: The crew turn a dark, divided 1887 two-family into an open, Scandinavian-style one-family home in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Kevin tours the house and Richard does an eye-opening energy audit. Architect Marcus Gleysteen shares his Scandinavian-style home.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Deconstruction and Design
programme.desc: Deconstruction continues on the 1887 two-family home. Arborist Jack Kelly removes the sick Norway maple that, left untouched, would come down on its own one day soon.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Modernizing a Balloon Frame
programme.desc: With the interior opened up, master carpenter Norm Abram shows the bones of the building and the unique features of a balloon framed house. Kevin and the homeowner learn about appropriate colours for the outside of her Victorian-era house.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Swedish Style
programme.desc: The general contractor works on the architect's plans to vary ceiling height on the first floor for dramatic effect. Two-by-fours and strapping drop the ceiling by eight inches in two places. Designers share the evolution of Scandinavian modern style.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Landscape Plans, Roof Deck
programme.desc: Landscape architect Greg Lombardi presents a yard plan with traditional and modern elements. Tom shows Kevin how he's gotten rid of the steps to the roof deck. Roger arrives to tackle the stump of the old Norway maple with a chainsaw and a stump grinder.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Exterior Improvements
programme.desc: Mason Mark McCullogh repoints the old brick foundation with great care and a type N mortar. Kevin visits Community Rowing to see how they make the Cambridge pastime of rowing available to everyone, including kids, disabled vets and general contractors.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Transitional Victorian
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1911 Craftsman Cottage
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1902 Queen Anne Victorian
programme.desc: Time has taken a toll on this 1902 Queen Anne Victorian house.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Expect lots of twists and turns in the kitchen when four cupcake makers face off to for the chance to be featured at an exclusive cast and crew party celebrating the 10,000th episode of the classic soap, The Young and the Restless.

programme.title: Trick or Eat
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall criss-crosses America to scare up some ghoulishly good grub and tricked-out treats, including mouth-watering zombie burgers in Atlanta, colossal freak shakes in Salem, Mass., and monstrous Franken-chops in New Orleans.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monsters, Monsters, Monsters
programme.desc: Nothing says Halloween more than scary monsters, and in the pre-heat, the seven bakers must create creepy bite-sized monster treats.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cravings From the Grave
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, mummy's the word as the six remaining bakers are asked to make a Halloween mummy dessert using pre-made pie dough. Next, the bakers must create a candy-stuffed, wicked cake based on a Halloween icon.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Haunted Circus
programme.desc: Things are only getting spookier with just five bakers left in the competition, who must head to the haunted circus for the pre-heat and create a dozen scary clown cake pops.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Spirits Rising
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers connect with the other side, baking up a tomb dessert for the pre-heat. The bakers make a dessert inspired by the colorful artistry and spirit of Mexico's Dia de los Muertos, or Day of the Dead.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Ginger Dead House
programme.desc: The three remaining bakers must fill a haunted tree with decorated Halloween cookies. For the grand finale, the bakers have just six hours to construct a spooky 'ginger dead' house.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.
